item.name: Crimson Sentry
item.description:
It takes little imagination to guess how this shark, one of two guardians keeping vigil over Shisui of the Violet Tides, got its name.

[Suitable for printing on large canvases.]

fish.guide: One of the two guardians of Shisui of the Violet Tides, this sentry has many times stained the sea red with the blood of those foolish enough to encroach upon the sacred halls.
